chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1424 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A. No.7311/2020 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2021 Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan advocate for petitioner. Mr. Kamaluddin advocate for respondents 3, 4 and 5. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. -.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner and respondents 3, 4 and 5 / LUMHS have filed following joint statement dated 11.03.2021: “ STATEMENT It is respectfully submitted that since the minutes of 36th Special Selection Board held on 24.07.2020 does not show presence and the signatures of 2 (two) subject Experts; and that the University had not yet received the Eligibility Certificate of the petitioner from PMDC, it ought to have adjourned the meeting instead of passing a resolution attributing the non-production of the eligibility certificate to the petitioner; which subsequently in fact was directly received by the University bearing No.866 dated 10.08.2020, certifying the petitioner “eligible for the post of Professor (Operative Dentistry),” before the said resolution of Special Selection Board was placed before the 49th meeting of Syndicate on 19.09.2020, without apprising it of the receipt of requisite PM&DC Certificate, by University administration. In view of the above situation, the petitioner shall be satisfied if his petition is disposed off with the directions to the respondent University Authorities to place his case again before the Special Selection Board alongwith PM&DC eligibility certificate No.866 dated 10.08.2020 and then before Syndicate, within a period of 2 (two) months to complete the process of appointment; and it be dismissed as not pressed against respondents No:1, 2, 6 & 7.” They request that the instant petition may be disposed of in terms of the above statement.

Learned counsel for the petitioner and respondents 3, 4 and 5 / LUMHS have filed following joint statement dated 11.03.2021: “ STATEMENT It is respectfully submitted that since the minutes of 36th Special Selection Board held on 24.07.2020 does not show presence and the signatures of 2 (two) subject Experts; and that the University had not yet received the Eligibility Certificate of the petitioner from PMDC, it ought to have adjourned the meeting instead of passing a resolution attributing the non-production of the eligibility certificate to the petitioner; which subsequently in fact was directly received by the University bearing No.866 dated 10.08.2020, certifying the petitioner “eligible for the post of Professor (Operative Dentistry),” before the said resolution of Special Selection Board was placed before the 49th meeting of Syndicate on 19.09.2020, without apprising it of the receipt of requisite PM&DC Certificate, by University administration. In view of the above situation, the petitioner shall be satisfied if his petition is disposed off with the directions to the respondent University Authorities to place his case again before the Special Selection Board alongwith PM&DC eligibility certificate No.866 dated 10.08.2020 and then before Syndicate, within a period of 2 (two) months to complete the process of appointment; and it be dismissed as not pressed against respondents No:1, 2, 6 & 7.” They request that the instant petition may be disposed of in terms of the above statement. By consent, the petition and listed application stand disposed of in terms of the above-quoted statement with no order as to costs. J U D G E J U D G E Ali Haider
